title: 交通标志识别系统
caption: 软件综合课程设计答辩
members: 罗祥瑞、文焕、闫硕、吉昌兆
style: 16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image, formal but not over-designed Chinese university software course-design defense, light background, refined blue and teal palette, small orange only for warning/risk, realistic product and technical presentation style, traffic sign recognition system theme, high-quality visual hierarchy, moderate information density, no cyberpunk, no dark stage, no neon, no excessive decoration, no childish cartoon, no watermark, no fake brand.

slides.title: 交通标志识别系统
slides.subtitle: 软件综合课程设计答辩
labels: 组员：罗祥瑞、文焕、闫硕、吉昌兆
slides.visual: cover slide, small course caption on top, dominant main title, road perspective, traffic signs, subtle AI detection box and dashboard preview

slides.title: 答辩内容安排
slides.subtitle: 先讲系统方案，再进行前端演示
slides.visual: agenda roadmap, five-section horizontal journey from background to final demo, with traffic-sign and system icons

slides.title: 项目背景与问题
slides.subtitle: 高速道路标志信息需要被及时识别、记录和利用
slides.visual: realistic road scene with multiple traffic signs, inspector tablet, alert card, problem callouts

slides.title: 课设目标与功能需求
slides.subtitle: 围绕识别、解析、查询、分析和提醒形成闭环
slides.visual: requirements matrix with five functional modules connected as a closed loop

slides.title: 系统总体方案
slides.subtitle: 从图像输入到业务结果输出的完整链路
slides.visual: end-to-end solution pipeline, camera/image/video input, AI model, database, web app dashboard

slides.title: 核心业务流程
slides.subtitle: 识别流程与违规检测流程协同工作
slides.visual: two-lane workflow diagram: recognition flow and violation flow, merged into record and analysis

slides.title: 技术架构设计
slides.subtitle: Vue 前端、FastAPI 后端、SQLite 数据层与模型模块
slides.visual: layered software architecture diagram with frontend, API, data, model, storage and authentication

slides.title: 识别模块设计
slides.subtitle: 真实模型与演示模式兼容，保证答辩可稳定演示
slides.visual: AI recognition module design: image/video/camera inputs into detection model, bounding boxes and confidence output

slides.title: 数据结构与信息解析
slides.subtitle: 把识别结果转换成可查询、可统计的业务数据
slides.visual: database schema infographic, entities connected with arrows, traffic sign dictionary and detection record cards

slides.title: 违规判定与提醒逻辑
slides.subtitle: 根据标志含义、车速和驾驶动作生成风险提醒
slides.visual: rule engine style diagram, speed limit sign plus vehicle speed, orange warning notification, violation ledger

slides.title: 前端功能模块
slides.subtitle: 面向管理员和驾驶员提供完整操作界面
slides.visual: high-fidelity web product module overview, five UI panels, sidebar navigation, clean dashboard style

slides.title: 后端接口与文件存储
slides.subtitle: 统一支撑检测上传、记录查询、统计导出和权限控制
slides.visual: backend API map, endpoints connected to database and uploaded/result image storage folders

slides.title: 测试验证与完成情况
slides.subtitle: 通过功能链路、构建和安全检查验证可演示性
slides.visual: verification dashboard with check marks, test pipeline, build artifact and product readiness checklist

slides.title: 前端演示路线
slides.subtitle: 讲完系统设计后，再打开最终前端进行操作展示
slides.visual: demo route map with numbered screens, browser window mockups and arrows, restrained presentation style

slides.title: 总结与答辩收束
slides.subtitle: 系统覆盖课设要求，形成从识别到管理的闭环
slides.visual: closing summary with completion checklist, traffic sign recognition product collage, light academic defense style

sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: All final slides must be generated by the built-in image_gen tool.
